_note: Synthetic recorded output for --dry-run: gets most codes, but conflates coping-after-loss into purpose (misses the coping line) and over-splits one line. ~P 0.83 / R 0.83. Replace via --live for a real number.

codings.codedText: it became the thing that gave my weeks a shape and a purpose
The other volunteers became like a second family to me
they asked me to coordinate the Saturday shifts
I go home and just cry
I started volunteering at the food bank
